page_content: Title Credits Production Practicum 1 1 Choreography III: Dance Composition 3 Dance Repertory 3 Select an additional 5 credits of the following: 5 DANC448 Modern Dance V 2 DANC449 Modern Dance VI 2 DANC468 Dance Repertory DANC420 Partnering DANC466 Laban Movement Analysis DANC371 Somatics DANC310 DANC399 Practicum in Choreography, Production and Performance III DANC499 Practicum in Choreography, Production and Performance IV DANC489 Special Topics in Dance Additional courses approved by the program.
